steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says Gogol finds it "gratifying" that his efforts "are to have some practical end." The word "end" is being tested. The tone is satisfaction, and "practical" signals something real and useful.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'limit': A practical limit on his efforts would be discouraging, not gratifying. ✗
  • Choice B — 'delay': A practical delay makes no sense and doesn't fit the positive tone. ✗
  • Choice C — 'decision': A practical decision is vague and doesn't capture what "end" means here. ✗
  • Choice D — 'purpose': "Practical purpose" maps exactly onto "practical end" — Gogol is gratified that his work will achieve something real and useful. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
